title: Forever Chemicals Are Sabotaging the Only Decade You Have to Build Bone
description: Adolescence is the one brief window when your body builds most of the bone mass it will rely on for life. This article argues that PFAS exposure is quietly undermining that process, while regulators and the companies that profit from these chemicals keep treating endocrine damage like it barely counts.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for Forever Chemicals Are Sabotaging the Only Decade You Have to Build Bone
